description: Announcement of new app functionality or feature release designed to drive user adoption and feature discovery among existing and potential users.
structural_recipe: Lead with visual demonstration of the new feature (screenshot, gif, or short video). Use Arabic text overlay explaining the benefit in simple terms. Include a clear CTA (دحمل التطبيق / Download Now or تحديث فوري / Update Now). Structure as carousel showing before/after or step-by-step usage. Add timestamp or 'متاح الآن' (Available Now) badge. Include relevant hashtags and app download link in bio or caption.
why_it_works: Saudi users value efficiency and convenience. App feature launches tap into desire for improved user experience and staying current with digital tools. Early adopters gain status, while announcements create urgency and FOMO. Demonstrates brand innovation and customer-centricity, building trust in the platform.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure feature is genuinely useful and addresses actual user pain points, not perceived ones
Avoid overcomplicating feature explanation—Saudi audiences prefer clarity
Localization must be authentic Arabic, not translated English terms
Feature must be available immediately; delayed launches damage credibility
Works best when solving real friction points in existing user journey
